title: Diagnose a VirtualService route that never matches
description: Inspect the proxy's effective config to see why a route isn't selected before editing the manifest blindly.
body: Use when traffic ignores a VirtualService rule. Do not keep editing the manifest by guesswork. Actions: dump the proxy's effective routes/clusters (istioctl proxy-config routes/clusters or the Envoy config dump), confirm the VirtualService host matches the service FQDN and the gateway/port line up, check that the referenced subset exists in a DestinationRule, and verify rule ordering (first match wins). Validation signals include the proxy config showing the expected route and a test request hitting the intended subset. Risk boundary: none for inspection; applying route changes to production still goes through the traffic gate.
